# slow-ops

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Records slow client operations (page load, element appearance) as deduped slow-op reports. Records slow server spans (http/db/loader) as deduped slow-op reports.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `ConfigV2.WebRegister`, `Core.Root` → `SlowOpCollector`
  - Uses: `config_v2.ConfigV2`, `config_v2.useConfig`, `primitives/live-state.registerSlowResourceReporter`, `reports.report`
- Server:
  - Uses: `config_v2.ConfigV2`, `config_v2.watchConfig`, `reports.recordReport`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
